activity-time.description: Date-time group (DTG) or timestamp of the observed activity.

authentication.description: Report authentication, release authority or validating official.

classification.description: Classification, marking or traffic-light protocol applied to the report.

conclusion.description: Reporter analysis of what the reported information means.

date-time.description: Date-time group (DTG) or timestamp when the report was made.

disseminated-to.description: Unit, organization, staff section or distribution list that received the report.

dissemination-time.description: Date-time group (DTG) or timestamp when the report was disseminated.

enemy-activity.description: Enemy activity description, including direction and speed if moving.

enemy-equipment.description: Major enemy equipment observed or assessed.

enemy-location.description: Enemy location such as UTM, MGRS grid, coordinate, place or area.

enemy-size.description: Enemy strength, size or number observed or assessed.

enemy-unit.description: Enemy nationality, unit designator, name or type.

evaluation.description: Evaluation of source, information, BDA or confidence.

format-reference.description: Doctrine, STANAG, SOP or other format reference used to produce the report.

handling-instructions.description: Caveats, releasability or handling instructions for the report.

narrative.description: Free text for additional information required for clarification of the report.

precedence.description: Message precedence assigned for transmission or dissemination.

raw-report.description: Original INTREP message, form, attachment or supporting file.

related-report.description: Related message, report or MISP event/object identifier.

related-requirement.description: Related PIR, IR, RFI, tasking or collection requirement identifier.

report-id.description: Local, organizational or message identifier for the INTREP.

report-number.description: Report format number, for example I001 or 1001 for INTREP.

reporting-unit.description: Unit, organization or collector element making the report.

sources.description: Reliability rating of source and credibility rating of information, or a source summary.

usmtf-message-id.description: USMTF message identifier, for example C110 for INTREP.

description: Object template for an Intelligence Report (INTREP) based on FM 34-35, FM 101-5-2 and FM 6-99 report/message formats for tactical intelligence reporting and dissemination.
name: intelligence-report
